heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 5517 Authorization of appropriations
notes: Amendments1988—Subsec. (b). substituted “National Institute of Standards and Technology” for “National Bureau of Standards”.Pub. L. 100–418
amendments: Amendments1988—Subsec. (b). substituted “National Institute of Standards and Technology” for “National Bureau of Standards”.Pub. L. 100–418

children.heading: Appropriations to National Aeronautics and Space Administration
children.label: a Appropriations to National Aeronautics and Space Administration
children.text: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated to the National Aeronautics and Space Administration for the fiscal year ending , $5,000,000, to remain available until expended, to carry out the functions vested in the Administrator by this subchapter.June 30, 1975

children.heading: Appropriations to Department of Housing and Urban Development
children.label: b Appropriations to Department of Housing and Urban Development
children.text: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated to the Department of Housing and Urban Development for the fiscal year ending , $5,000,000, to remain available until expended. Any sums so appropriated shall be available (1) to carry out the functions vested in the Secretary of Housing and Urban Development by this subchapter, and (2) for transfer to the Department of Defense, the National Institute of Standards and Technology, and the General Services Administration to enable them to carry out their respective functions under this subchapter.June 30, 1975

children.heading: Appropriations for programs under this subchapter
children.label: c Appropriations for programs under this subchapter
children.text: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated for the fiscal years ending , 1977, 1978, and 1979, $50,000,000 in the aggregate to carry out the programs established by this subchapter.June 30, 1976
